title: Gossypium soudanense
taxonomy: Gossypium soudanense is a species of cotton plant. It belongs to the genus Gossypium and the family Malvaceae. The species Gossypium soudanense is part of the order Malvales. It is native to West Africa and is considered a wild cotton species. The classification of Gossypium soudanense reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the Gossypium genus.
